one_time_description: Treaty land entitlement received of $120,824,032 offset by member distributions of $98,766,624; also legal settlement of $1,327,484
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprise portfolio including forestry, camp services, wind energy, green energy, communications, reclamation, and supply partnerships. Treaty land entitlement received and distributed to members in 2024.
notes: Province is BC despite auditor being in Grande Prairie AB. Large one-time treaty land entitlement of $120.8M received and $98.8M distributed to members. Extensive GBE portfolio with 23 entities accounted for by modified equity method. 3 consolidated subsidiaries including 50%-owned Nikanese Wah Tzee Stewardship Society, 100%-owned 1225936 Limited Partnership, and 100%-controlled Linda Krystina Housing Society. Balance sheet detail for current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, and tangible capital assets not fully extracted from provided text. Prior year audit performed by a different auditor. Temporary investments of $93.2M significantly increased from $28.3M prior year.
